case_title: CONWAY, JOSEPH DBA HOWARD ASSOCIATES vs. BRYANT, JEROME et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONWAY, JOSEPH DBA HOWARD ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, JEROME DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONWAY, JOSEPH DBA HOWARD ASSOCIATES SERVED APR-09-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, JEROME

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONWAY, JOSEPH DBA HOWARD ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, JEROME THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1068 HOWARD ST #3, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522.
